title: Vampire Craft
description:
Become a vampire and survive the night! 
Explore dark biomes, hunt for blood, and unlock powerful vampire abilities
body:
Welcome to Vampire Craft, a Minecraft Java modpack where the night is your ally and the sun is your greatest enemy.

In this world, you are no longer human — you are a vampire. Hunt, evolve, and survive as you embrace your dark powers.

Explore mysterious biomes, face dangerous creatures, and unlock unique vampire abilities that change the way you play survival Minecraft forever.

Every night is a new hunt. Every sunrise, a new threat.
Will you feed, evolve, and rule the darkness — or burn under the light?

Features:

🦇 Become a vampire with custom powers and progression

🌑 Explore new dark and cursed biomes

🧛 Survive using blood as your main resource

⚔️ Fight new mobs and creatures lurking in the night

🧪 Discover items, gear, and upgrades designed for vampire survival

The night is calling…
Are you ready to answer?
